_comment: Source of truth: supabase/migrations/ — tylko tabele potwierdzone przez migracje SQL. Tabela 'payments' NIE istnieje w migracjach — nieuwzględniona. Kolumny: tylko te potwierdzone przez CREATE TABLE w migracjach.

tables.name: offers
tables.notes: Status enum: DRAFT/SENT/ACCEPTED/REJECTED/ARCHIVED. RLS: user_id = auth.uid()

tables.name: v2_projects
tables.notes: Status enum: ACTIVE/COMPLETED/ON_HOLD. RLS: user_id = auth.uid()

tables.name: clients
tables.notes: RLS: user_id = auth.uid(). enforce_client_limit trigger installed.

tables.name: plan_limits
tables.notes: RLS: SELECT allowed for all (USING true). Seeded: free/pro/starter/business/enterprise.

tables.name: profiles
tables.notes: RLS: user_id = auth.uid(). Auto-created on auth.users INSERT via trigger.

tables.name: dsar_requests
tables.notes: PR-L3 DSAR Inbox. RLS: requester_user_id=auth.uid() (user own); admin via user_roles. No DELETE policy — soft-close via status. SLA: due_at = created_at + 30 days.

tables.name: legal_documents
tables.notes: PR-L1. RLS: public SELECT for published; admin CRUD via is_admin() (PR-L4). Status: draft/published/archived. Unique partial index: one published per slug+language.

tables.name: legal_acceptances
tables.notes: PR-L1. RLS: authenticated INSERT (user_id=auth.uid()); authenticated SELECT own rows. GDPR consent audit trail — no DELETE policy.

tables.name: compliance_audit_log
tables.notes: PR-L8. Append-only (no UPDATE/DELETE policy). RLS: authenticated INSERT (actor_user_id=auth.uid()); SELECT own events. source CHECK: frontend/edge_function/migration/admin.

tables.name: subprocessors
tables.notes: PR-L5. RLS: public SELECT for active rows (status='active'). No INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE for non-admin. Seeded: supabase/resend/sentry/stripe/openai/anthropic/gemini/plausible/vercel.

tables.name: retention_rules
tables.notes: PR-L6. RLS: admin-only SELECT and UPDATE. Seeded with evidence-based retention periods. UNIQUE on applies_to.

tables.name: data_breaches
tables.notes: PR-L7. RLS: admin-only SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE. No DELETE policy — breach records are legal evidence. 72h reporting SLA: report_deadline_at = detected_at + 72h.
